hero.title: Your Partner in
hero.subtitle: From construction and renovation to finishing and home preparation – we deliver your projects with precision and high professionalism.

services.title: Our Comprehensive Services
services.subtitle: We provide a full range of construction services to meet all your needs.
services.constructionDesc: Complete construction projects from foundation to final handover with the highest quality standards.
services.finishingDesc: Luxury interior finishes and professional exterior finishing for all types of buildings.
services.renovationDesc: Comprehensive renovation and restoration of old buildings using the latest techniques.
services.homeReadyDesc: A complete service to fully prepare your home and make it ready for immediate living.

quality.title: Quality Levels
quality.subtitle: Choose the quality level that fits your budget and needs.

features.title: Why Enohm Bau?
features.subtitle: Discover what makes us the preferred partner for your construction projects.
features.highQualityDesc: We guarantee first-class work using the best materials and skilled craftsmen.
features.onTimeDeliveryDesc: We complete your project on schedule without delays.
features.longExperienceDesc: Over 15 years of experience in construction and finishing.
features.professionalTeamDesc: Highly qualified engineers and craftsmen dedicated to your project.
features.comprehensiveServicesDesc: From planning to handover – everything in one place.
features.customSolutionsDesc: Tailor-made designs for your residential and commercial spaces.

howItWorks.subtitle: Simple steps to receive a customized quote for your project.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Construction, Finishing, Renovation, or Home Preparation.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subtitle: Contact us today for a free consultation and a no-obligation quote.

form.heroSubtitle: Request a quote for your project today and get the best solutions with top quality and fast delivery.

footer.description: Your trusted partner in high-quality construction and renovation projects.

qualityPages.ctaSub: Contact us for a personalized quote

standard.hero: Reliable Quality at the Right Price
standard.heroSub: Certified materials and a professional team to complete your project efficiently
standard.f1: Certified building materials compliant with German standards
standard.f2: Experienced team with at least 5 years of experience

plus.heroSub: Superior materials and continuous oversight to ensure the highest quality standards
plus.f2: Dedicated specialist engineer throughout the project
plus.f5: Weekly reports with photos sent to client

premium.heroSub: The finest European materials and VIP service for exceptional projects that settle for nothing less than perfection
premium.f1: Luxury materials imported from top European suppliers
premium.f2: Dedicated project engineer throughout the journey
premium.f5: Daily reports and on-site client visits
premium.g2: Free maintenance throughout the entire warranty period

construction.desc1: We provide full construction services starting from excavation, site preparation, and foundation pouring, through executing the concrete structure in all its elements, up to delivering the building ready for the finishing phase.
construction.desc2: We adhere to approved engineering drawings and technical specifications, and use high-quality materials to ensure durability, safety, and sustainability.
construction.featuresSub: Everything you need for your construction project in one place
construction.f1Desc: Executing concrete structures to the highest quality and durability standards
construction.f2Desc: Full compliance with approved technical specifications
construction.f3Desc: Residential, commercial, and administrative for all your needs
construction.f4Desc: Delivering projects on schedule without delay

cladding.desc1: We provide comprehensive cladding services for exterior and interior facades, from stone and composite aluminum cladding, through modern glass facades, to final coatings and finishes.
cladding.desc2: We use the best insulating and weather-resistant materials, adhering to the highest quality and precision standards to ensure the beauty and longevity of your building.
cladding.featuresSub: Everything you need for your building's facade in one place
cladding.f1Desc: Installing modern glass facades to the highest standards of precision and quality
cladding.f2Desc: Executing exterior cladding works with diverse and highly durable materials
cladding.f3Desc: Adding a distinctive aesthetic character that reflects the building's identity
cladding.f4Desc: Protecting the building from weather elements, heat, and humidity

renovation.desc1: We provide comprehensive renovation services for old and deteriorated buildings, starting from diagnosing structural problems and treating cracks and moisture, through strengthening structures, to renewing interior and exterior finishes.
renovation.desc2: Our specialized team works with precision and professionalism to restore the building to its optimal condition, while preserving its architectural character and ensuring structural safety for many years.
renovation.featuresSub: Comprehensive renovation solutions to restore your building to its best condition
renovation.f1Desc: Repairing and strengthening old structural frameworks and renewing them
renovation.f2Desc: Professional solutions for treating cracks, moisture, and damage
renovation.f3Desc: Renewing facades, ceilings, and floors with high quality
renovation.f4Desc: Delivering the renovated building like new on the scheduled date

homePrep.desc1: We provide a comprehensive service to prepare your home before you return, including inspection and repair of electricity and plumbing, paint renewal, door and window maintenance, and thorough cleaning from top to bottom.
homePrep.desc2: We handle every detail carefully so you find your home in its best condition upon arrival — warm, tidy, and ready to live in without any hassle.
homePrep.featuresSub: Everything your home needs to be ready to welcome you
homePrep.f1Desc: Inspection and repair of all electrical connections and water networks
homePrep.f2Desc: Renewal of interior and exterior paints with modern colors
homePrep.f3Desc: Maintenance and installation of doors and windows with proper insulation
homePrep.f4Desc: Delivering the home clean and ready to live in upon completion
